Entity Profile
P

Ishmael Palin

Person · First seen 3301-09-13 · 36 mentions
Active: 3301-09-13 → 3303-09-22

L

Mentions Timeline (67 articles)
3310-02-15
Guardian Nanite Torpedoes Enter Production
Aegis reveals Ram Tah's Guardian nanite torpedo technology and begins mass production, with Palin constructing a Thargoid-spire-armoured warhead that can function within Maelstrom anti-Guardian fields.
3310-02-08
Anti-Titan Project Boosted by Thargoid Spire Materials
Aegis confirms Thargoid spire materials have accelerated anti-Titan weapon development, with Tesreau announcing superpower funding redirected to the project and prototypes potentially ready within a week.
3310-02-01
Harvest Thargoid Materials for Anti-Titan Project
Aegis urgently requests Thargoid spire site materials for Professor Palin and Ram Tah's classified anti-Titan weapon research, with Palin developing resistant armour using organic compounds from the spires.
3310-01-25
Guardian Deliveries Accelerate Anti-Titan Project
Aegis confirms Guardian relic deliveries have boosted Ram Tah's anti-Titan research, with Palin joining the effort and Tanner managing expectations about the proposed weapon's capabilities.
3309-12-07
Spire Shutdown Confirms Thargoid Vulnerability
Professor Palin's biological contaminant successfully halts Thargoid spire site operations in the Hyades Sector ST-Q B5-5 system, confirming a vulnerability in Thargoid infrastructure.
3309-11-28
Thargoid War Update: November 3309
Sanderlyn's monthly war update covers Titan resistance, Palin's spire breakthrough, the quarantine debate, and Winters's plan to send returnees home.
3309-11-10
Palin Makes Thargoid Spire Breakthrough
Palin discovers genetic commonalities between spire compounds and Titan hull fragments, synthesising a biological contaminant to disrupt spire processing chains.
3309-10-31
Aegis Prioritises Research into Thargoid Spire Sites
Aegis prioritises research into rapidly evolving Thargoid spire sites, with Fonseca theorising about their purpose and Palin requesting samples.
3309-02-13
Aegis Returns
The anti-xeno agency Aegis is officially reformed by the Alliance, Empire and Federation, with Professor Alba Tesreau as its head.
3309-01-27
Xeno Scanner Upgrade
Professor Palin's team at Arque Laboratory releases an improved xeno scanner with double the range to aid anti-xeno combat operations.
3309-01-20
Thargoid War Update: January 3309
Vox Galactica reporter Jade Sanderlyn summarizes the devastating state of the Second Thargoid War following the arrival of the eight Maelstroms.
3308-11-30
Havoc as Thargoids Overrun Multiple Systems
Nine systems have called for help against massive Thargoid attacks intent on wiping out civilian populations.
3308-11-29
Taranis Unleashes Thargoid Invasion Fleets
The Taranis anomaly has arrived in Hyades Sector FB-N b7-6, triggering a ferocious wave of Thargoid attacks in the region.
3308-11-28
Militaries on Alert as Taranis Approaches
The Hyades Sector FB-N b7-6 system has been identified as the location where the rogue signal source named Taranis will finally arrive.
3308-11-15
Public Unnerved by Palin Announcement
The announcement that the rogue signal sources heading towards the core systems are Thargoid in origin has caused unease within the general public.
3308-11-14
Xeno-Peacers Reject Prediction of War
A claim that the rogue signal sources form part of a potential Thargoid offensive has been disputed by many in the pro-peace movement.
3308-11-11
Further FSS Scanner Upgrade Released
A version of the FSS scanning software used to track the Thargoid anomalies has been made available to the Pilots’ Federation.
3308-11-10
Understanding the ‘Thargoid Roar’
Professor Alba Tesreau, Professor Ishmael Palin and Ram Tah have released a joint statement regarding the alien sound heard at HIP 22460.
3308-11-04
Destination: Humanity
It has been confirmed that the mysterious anomalies known as rogue signal sources are all converging on the core systems.
3308-10-11
Subject D-2 Rejects Azimuth
Seo Jin-ae, the Project Seraph survivor, has refused to have any further contact with Azimuth Biotech following its offer of help.
3308-08-19
Palin and Ram Tah Seek Unclassified Relics
Professors Ishmael Palin and Ram Tah request deliveries of newly discovered unclassified relics that emit both Guardian and Thargoid energy signatures due to molecular realignment of their crystalline structure.
3308-08-17
Mysteries of the Thargoids
Professor Ishmael Palin publishes an article emphasising how little humanity truly understands about Thargoid civilisation, society, and objectives, and warns that the Proteus Wave has likely earned humanity the Thargoids' full attention.
3308-06-16
Xenological Project Receives Thargoid Artefacts
Professor Ishmael Palin concludes his Thargoid research project in the Arque system after pilots deliver alien probes, resin, and sensors to Abel Laboratory.
3308-06-09
Thargoid Research Project Phase Two Begins
Professor Ishmael Palin launches phase two of his Thargoid research project, requesting fresh alien artefacts for study.
3308-05-12
Thargoid Research Project Phase One Completed
Professor Ishmael Palin completes the first phase of his Thargoid research project after receiving meta-alloy shipments.
3308-05-05
Thargoid Research Project Requires Meta-Alloys
Professor Ishmael Palin requests meta-alloy samples for a xenological study of Thargoid technology.
3305-08-06
Further Migration to Witch Head Nebula
Engineer Chloe Sedesi, former apprentice of Professor Ishmael Palin, migrates to the Witch Head Nebula to establish an engineering facility at Cinder Dock. The enclave attracts thousands seeking a fresh start.
3305-07-30
A New Home for Professor Palin
Professor Ishmael Palin establishes a permanent research base at Abel Laboratory in the Arque system, resuming his engineering services and meta-alloy studies following the evacuation from Maia.
3305-07-22
Carson's Spring Reaches Arque System
The megaship Carson's Spring successfully transports Professor Ishmael Palin and his staff from Maia to the Arque system, where a new permanent research base is being established at Abel Laboratory.
3305-07-18
Thargoids Return to Pleiades Nebula
Thargoid forces resurface in the Pleiades Nebula in large numbers, prompting the evacuation of Professor Ishmael Palin from the Palin Research Centre in Maia as his megaship Carson's Spring comes under assault.
3305-07-11
Thargoids Withdraw from Core Systems
Thargoid forces abruptly withdraw from most human-occupied space, leaving only Maia and Merope with reported activity. Admiral Tanner suggests defensive operations depleted their numbers, while Professor Palin warns against premature celebration.
3303-09-22
Community Goal Engineers Appeal for Thargoid Material

Galactic News Federal Blockade Ends

Meta Alloy Sale Announced at Darnielle's Progress

Freelance Report Dr Arcanonn Comments on Palin's Retirement

Galactic News Wilkes Orbital Appeal Comes to an End
3302-03-17
Community Goal Wilkes Orbital in Need
3302-03-15
Galactic News Breakthrough in the Fight against Technological Plague
3302-03-14
Galactic News Ishmael Palin Describes Kidnapping
3302-03-09
Galactic News Ishmael Palin on the Road to Recovery
3302-03-05
Galactic News Professor Ishmael Palin Found
3302-02-24
Galactic News Technological Plague Continues to Threaten Starports
3302-02-15

3302-02-09
Galactic News Professor Ishmael Palin Missing
3302-02-07
Galactic News Ishmael Palin to Depart for Maia b1ba
3302-02-05
Freelance Report Detail of Dr Arcanonn Death Threats Revealed
3302-01-28
Galactic News Professor Ishmael Palin Announces Breakthrough
3302-01-23
Galactic News Professor Ishmael Palin Responds to Fellow Scientist's Concerns
3302-01-21
Community Goal Professor Ishmael Palin Issues Request for Meta Alloys
3301-12-23
Scientist's Appeal Successful
3301-12-21
The Canonn Supports Palin's Effort
3301-10-29
CIRG Researcher Addresses Artefact Developments
3301-10-01
Professor Ishmael Palin Responds to Proposal
3301-09-27
Palin Invited to Join Research Group
3301-09-20
Federal Research Programme Terminated
3301-09-13
Research into Strange Objects Begins
